narrative:
West Muskingum Local Sd (Musk) school district has 9,096 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
